summary: Guard AI WebUI response JSON type before .get access; downgrade retry-timeout logs to DEBUG to preserve progress-bar readability.
source_links: user-report: NoneType.get error in webui and progress bar broken by timeout warnings
details: Treat non-dict response.json() as invalid response and fallback without crashing.
In chat-completions parsing, verify choices/message node types before calling .get.
Use DEBUG for retry timeout logs to avoid interrupting user progress display.
